caption: The video captures a large, white aircraft with "Russia" written on its side as it taxis along a runway. The plane is moving forward steadily, its wheels firmly on the ground, and its engines appear to be running, indicated by the visible exhaust. The surrounding area includes a grassy field and a tall antenna structure in the background. As the plane continues its movement, a helicopter becomes visible in the distance, adding to the dynamic scene of an active airfield. The overcast sky suggests cloudy weather conditions, contributing to the overall atmosphere of the video.
